channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月30日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit in Paris #2 Bijou64: A variable-length integer encoding #3 GTA 6 Developers Unionize #4 I am retiring from tech to live offline #5 Danish Pension Blacklists SpaceX over 'Catastrophic Governance' #6 High Density Living, 2000 Years Ago: Inside the Roman Apartment Building #7 CAPTCHAs can still detect AI agents #8 Someone used my open source project to phish people #9 Tulip mania: when a single flower was worth more than a house (2025) #10 The Dead Economy Theory
